terms: # 1: Definitions:
- The silly developer and other registered users
- "Registered User":
- Someone registered that has rights post in this forums
- "Post":
- A post made by one of the users
- "Developer(s)":
- Iris (TinyVirtual), the goofy dumbass developer and who manages this forum
- "Guest":
- Unregistered visitor
# 2: Collected Data:
- Guests:
- We do not collect any personal information
- We do not collect any non-personal information
- We do not collect anything from you at all!
- We do not store Browser Cookies, only physical cookies
- Registered User:
- We do not collect any personal information considered PII
- We collect only your posts, your profile picture, your bio, your username and display name
# 3: How your data is processed:
- Guest:
- We don't
- Registered Users:
- Your posts are added into the forums and your profile info is added to our users
# 4: Cookies:
- Browser Cookies are not stored

- A [cookie](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cookie) is a sweet biscuit with high sugar and fat content. Cookie dough is softer than that used for other types of biscuit, and they are cooked longer at lower temperatures. The dough typically contains flour, sugar, egg, and some type of oil or fat. It may include other ingredients such as raisins, oats, chocolate chips, or nuts. Cookie texture varies from crisp and crunchy to soft and chewy, depending on the exact combination of ingredients and methods used to create them.
# 5: Third Party Services:
- We don't share your info to any third party service
- Your browser downloads embeds and media from safe pages such as YouTube, Tenor, Discord and Google
- Hosted by GitHub Pages. See their privacy [here](https://docs.github.com/pt/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-general-privacy-statement)
# 6: Request a post:
- Only trusted users can request a post
- Users can only be registered from personal contact
- Users posts can only be published if we decide it is safe and can be posted or comes from Tiny
